description_zh: 7岁以上的老猫,精神略萎靡,主人记录最近食欲下降
description_en: 7+ yo senior cat looking lethargic, owner logged recent appetite drop

expectations.rationale: diary + photo together flag energy issue
should reference the energy signal explicitly

qualitative_criteria_zh: 必须把日记里的食欲下降和照片里的精神状态联系起来
应该建议带去兽医面诊(老猫 + 多日异常)
不能给出确诊式的医疗诊断
qualitative_criteria_en: Must connect the diary's appetite drop with the photo's energy read
Should recommend a vet visit (senior cat + multi-day anomaly)
Must not give a confident medical diagnosis
